name: Cherry Almond Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out dough 1/8-inch thick on a lightly floured surface. Fit it into a 9-inch pie plate. Crimp edges decoratively and chill the shell.
2. Over a bowl, pit cherries, combine them with the tapioca, lemon juice, salt, sugar, almond extract, and cloves, and stir until well combined. Let filling stand, stirring occasionally, for 15 minutes.
3. In a bowl with an electric mixer, cream the butter. Add the almond paste and zest. Beat mixture until well combined.
4. Add the egg yolks, one at a time, beating well after each addition. Beat in flour and almond paste mixture. Transfer to a pastry bag fitted with a 1/4-inch plain tip.
5. Spoon filling into the shell, pressing gently to level the top. Pipe almond paste mixture over filling, forming a lattice pattern of strips about one inch apart.
6. Brush edge of shell with egg wash. Bake in the lower third of a preheated 425°F oven for 25 minutes.
7. Reduce heat to 350°F and bake for 15-20 minutes more, or until the crust and lattice are golden brown and the filling is bubbling. Cool on a rack.
